prompt: Show the current Makefile targets for the project at /workspace/myproject.

create_files.content:
CC=gcc
CFLAGS=-Wall -Wextra
SRC=src/main.c
OUT=build/app

.PHONY: all clean test

all: $(OUT)

$(OUT): $(SRC)
	mkdir -p build
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $(OUT) $(SRC)

test:
	./build/app --test

clean:
	rm -rf build/
